name: dokkan-web-scraper
description: Advanced TypeScript web scraper for Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle character data

scripts.run: NODE_OPTIONS="--disable-warning=DEP0180" node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/index.ts
scripts.import-db: node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/database/import-cli.ts
scripts.api: NODE_OPTIONS="--disable-warning=DEP0180" node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("ts-node/esm", pathToFileURL("./"));' src/api/index.ts
